zh.West Hanningfield, Essex, England: 英國艾可韋斯特 韓寧費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Pelham I於1468年出生在英國素可勞頓時，他的父親Thomas Pelham Esq.44歲，母親Margaret Edmonds34歲。他於大約1507年與Mary Carew在英國艾可韋斯特 韓寧費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年10月27日在他的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.West Hanningfield, Essex, England: 英国艾可韋斯特 韓寧費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Pelham I于1468年出生在英国素可勞頓时，他的父亲Thomas Pelham Esq.44岁，母亲Margaret Edmonds34岁。他于大约1507年与Mary Carew在英国艾可韋斯特 韓寧費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1538年10月27日在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pelham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Sussex): habitational name from Brent Pelham, Furneux Pelham, and Stocking Pelham in Hertfordshire, so called from the Old English personal name Pēola + hām ‘homestead’. Compare Pellham .

History: The manor of Pelham in Hertfordshire, England, was held by Walter de Pelham in the reign of Edward I (1272–1307). His descendants became constables of Pevensey Castle, Sussex, and were so influential that their badge, the buckle, is seen in at least eleven of the county's churches, and as a decoration on iron chimney-backs in Sussex farmhouses. Various branches of the family were ennobled and their titles include earl of Chichester and earl of Yarborough. The family also once held the dukedom of Newcastle and the marquessate of Clare. Peter Pelham (born c. 1695), an engraver, emigrated to Boston, MA, after 1728, and was stepfather to the artist John Singleton Copley.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Pelham I was born in 1468, in Laughton, Sussex, England, his father, Thomas Pelham Esq., was 44 and his mother, Margaret Edmonds, was 34. He married Mary Carew about 1507, in West Hanningfield, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 27 October 1538, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Pelham I est né en 1468, à Laughton, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Pelham Esq., avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Edmonds, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Mary Carew environ 1507, à West Hanningfield, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 27 octobre 1538, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Pelham I 1468 in Laughton, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Pelham Esq. 44 und seine Mutter Margaret Edmonds 34. Er hat um 1507 in West Hanningfield, Essex, England Mary Carew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Oktober 1538 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Pelham I è nato il nel 1468 nel Laughton, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Pelham Esq., aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Edmonds, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Mary Carew circa 1507, nel West Hanningfield, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 27 ottobre 1538, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.Halland, Laughton, Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックスラウトン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Pelham Iが1468年にイギリススセックスラウトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Pelham Esq.は44歳，母Margaret Edmondsは34歳であった。約1507年にイギリスエセックスウエスト ハニングフィールドでMary Carewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1538年10月27日に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Pelham I(이)가 1468년 영국 수세스 로그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Pelham Esq.(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Edmonds(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1507년 영국 에세스 웨스트 해닝필드에서 Mary Carew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 10월 27일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Halland, Laughton, Sussex, England: Laughton, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Pelham I nasceu em 1468, em Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Pelham Esq., tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Edmonds, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Carew aproximadamente 1507, em West Hanningfield, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1538, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Pelham I родился в 1468 г. в местности лотон, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Pelham Esq. было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Edmonds, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Carew около 1507 г. в местности вест ханнингфиелд, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 27 октября 1538 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Pelham I nació en 1468, en Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Pelham Esq., tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret Edmonds, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Mary Carew aproximadamente 1507, en West Hanningfield, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1538, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
